headline: What Makes Ecolab (ECL) an Attractive Investment?
summary: Mar Vista Investment Partners, LLC, an investment management company, released its “Mar Vista U.S. Quality Strategy” first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. U.S. equities entered 2026 with sustained momentum, despite market leadership evolving significantly over the first quarter. Initial support in equities was hampered by tariff uncertainty, doubts […]
